# arubasdwan_application_groups (Data Source)

Fetches the list of user-defined application groups (tags) from the Aruba SD-WAN Orchestrator via GET /gms/rest/applicationDefinition/applicationTags?resourceKey=userDefined.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "arubasdwan_application_groups" "all" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `application_groups` (Attributes List) List of application groups configured on the Orchestrator. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--application_groups))

<a id="nestedatt--application_groups"></a>
### Nested Schema for `application_groups`

Read-Only:

- `apps` (List of String) List of application names in this group.
- `name` (String) The name of the application group.
